response.justification: Candidate significantly exceeds seniority requirements with 10+ years of experience and current staff-level role. Strong Node.js/TypeScript backend expertise and active AI agent development experience (MCP protocols, agentic workflows) are major strengths matching required skills. However, React is not mentioned in recent experience (Ember.js featured instead), and Nest.js is absent from documented work history. These gaps are concerning for a role where React is primary and Nest.js is specified—requires clarification on whether this represents skill gaps or resume incompleteness.
strengths: Significantly exceeds 6+ year requirement with 10+ years of documented fullstack experience across multiple staff/senior roles
Current role explicitly demonstrates required AI agent development skills (MCP code generators, agentic infrastructure) and strong TypeScript/Node.js expertise

Proven architectural and infrastructure capabilities: designed CI/CD systems, Docker/Kubernetes deployments at Altom; optimized high-throughput microservices handling millions of requests/second at Dunnhumby
concerns: React not mentioned in recent experience; Ember.js appears as primary frontend framework instead—unclear if this represents a skill gap or resume omission
Nest.js not mentioned anywhere in work history; specific testing frameworks (Jest, Vitest, Playwright) not explicitly listed despite extensive testing background including TDD practice
Cloud platform experience limited to AWS CDK at one role; no mention of GCP or Azure; Kubernetes/Docker experience present but with minimal detail on production-scale containerization

key_factors.factor: React Framework Not in Recent History
